a:r.a:t: Secure P2P Chat · Integrity-Bound Secure Messaging · HACKSECURE'26
Design a cryptographically sealed pipeline where every stage commits to the previous via hashes, signatures, and strict
so that any bit-level tampering is detectable.
Each stage verifies the previous before proceeding. Tampering at any link breaks all subsequent links.
Each stage authenticates state from all prior stages. No "optional" hashing
All content is encrypted on endpoints. Relay servers forward only ciphertext and never see plaintext or private keys.
Transport routes encrypted packets and enforces TTL. No central logging of message content or identity graphs.
Strong guarantees against MITM, replay, tampering. Transparent about out-of-scope threats: compromised device, social engineering.
